cart.emptyCopy: Once you add something to your bag, it will appear here. Ready to get started?
cart.notReserved: Items in your bag are not reserved — check out now to make them yours.
cart.freeShippingCopy: Your FIFA World Cup 26™ gear unlocks free shipping with any method on your entire bag, be ready for the next match.

wishlist.title: MY WISHLIST
wishlist.emptyCopy: You haven't saved any items to your wishlist yet. Start shopping and add your favorite items to your wishlist.
wishlist.appPromoTitle: Get more from your wishlist through the app
appPromoBullets: Instant notifications on items on sale or low in stock
Share your wishlist with friends and family
See which wishlist items are eligible for a voucher
Get 50 adiClub points and unlock more rewards with the app
wishlist.appPromoScan: Scan to download the adidas app
wishlist.appQrAlt: QR code to download the adidas app

orderSummary.title: Order Summary
orderSummary.paypalInstallments: As low as {{amount}}/mo at 0% APR with

trustSignals.installments: Pay over time in interest-free installments with Affirm, Klarna or Afterpay

paymentMethods.sslEncrypted: Payments are SSL encrypted so that your credit card and payment details stay safe.
paymentMethods.stripeSecure: Your payment details are encrypted and processed securely by Stripe.
paymentMethods.paypalRedirect: You will be redirected to PayPal to complete your payment.
paymentMethods.payWithVnpay: Pay with VNPay (Bank transfer, ATM, e-wallet)
paymentMethods.afterpayDescription: Place your order today and pay in 4 payments every 2 weeks. No interest or fees when you pay on time.
paymentMethods.affirmDescription: Payment options depend on purchase amount. No late fees.

checkout.title: CHECKOUT
checkout.saveInfo: Save address and contact information for future orders
checkout.sameAddress: Billing and delivery address are the same

address.noSaved: No saved addresses. Add one to get started.
address.addDescription: Add a new delivery address for your orders
address.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this address? This action cannot be undone.

stripe.keyMissing: Stripe publishable key is missing. Please set NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.
stripe.keyNotConfigured: Stripe publishable key is not configured. Please set NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.
stripe.clientSecretMissing: Stripe client secret is missing from response.
stripe.notLoaded: Stripe has not finished loading yet. Please try again in a moment.
stripe.intentNotConfirmed: Payment intent could not be confirmed.

errors.address: Please enter or select your delivery address.
errors.cartEmpty: Your cart is empty. Please add items before checkout.
errors.stripeNotReady: Stripe payment form is not ready. Please try again.
errors.orderAfterPayment: Payment succeeded but order creation failed. Please contact support.
errors.processOrderFailed: Failed to process order. Please try again.
